app.name: MohsenTracker
app.tagline: Become your next version. Build the habits. See the future.

onboarding.welcomeBody: Tiny daily actions compound into the person you become. Let's design who you're becoming, then build the habits that get you there.
onboarding.languageBody: You can change this anytime in settings.
onboarding.futureSelfNameTitle: What's the name of your future self?
onboarding.futureSelfNameBody: A label for who you're becoming. Something like "{example}". You'll see this every day.
onboarding.visionTitle: Who do you want to become in 1 year?
onboarding.visionBody: Describe the person you want to be in 2–3 sentences. We'll show this on your dashboard so you remember why you started.
onboarding.visionPlaceholder: I am a person who prays on time, reads daily, and treats my family with kindness…
onboarding.whyTitle: Why does this matter to you?
onboarding.whyBody: When motivation fades, your reason is what keeps you going. Write it like you'd say it out loud.
onboarding.whyPlaceholder: Because I want my children to see a father who keeps his word, prays on time, and never gives up…
onboarding.categoriesBody: Start with what feels right. You can change this later.

home.noHabits: You haven't added any habits yet.

habit.name: Habit name
habit.replacementHint: What good habit will you do instead?

progress.title: Progress
progress.noStreaks: Complete a habit today to start a streak.

futureSelf.thirtyDayHint: How consistent you've been per category.
futureSelf.noWhy: Add the reason that drives you.
futureSelf.noFutureSelfName: Give your future self a name.

quotes.q0: 10 pages a day → 12 books a year → 120 books in a decade. Still a small daily act, but a transformed life.
quotes.q1: 30 minutes of movement daily → 182 hours a year — enough to walk from London to Paris twice.
quotes.q2: 1 hour less scrolling daily → 15 full days reclaimed every year.
quotes.q3: 5 pages of Quran daily → completes the Quran every 4 months. Three khatmas a year.
quotes.q4: Tahajjud once a week → 52 nights of closeness with your Lord this year.
quotes.q5: 1 act of sadaqah daily → 365 acts a year. Charity that keeps giving.
quotes.q6: 15 minutes of learning daily → 91 hours of mastery a year. Compounded over a decade, a new identity.

presets.fivePrayers: Five daily prayers in their time
